title: agrostis tenuis var. alpina
intro: Agrostis tenuis var. alpina, also known as Alpine Brome, is a variety of grass found in high-altitude mountainous regions. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Alpine Brome are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or salve, which are used to treat various health issues, including skin irritations and minor cuts and scrapes.
